rationale: This statute governs teacher mathematics academies and stipends. It references funding via Section 48.108 or other available funds but contains no provision tied to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value. No direct conflict.
quote: Except as provided by Subsection (d-1), from funds provided under Section 48.108 or other available funds, a classroom teacher who completes a mathematics achievement academy is entitled to receive a stipend from the school district in the amount determined by the commissioner.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13 in this statute. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district funding is speculative and does not constitute a statutory conflict.
